title: Implement assignment status actions on detail screen
description: Wire manager assignment detail UI to new assignment lifecycle actions so managers can complete, reassign, and cancel assignments with deterministic button states, loading/error handling, and post-action refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment detail screen exposes only valid actions for the current assignment state
Reassign flow can select a provider and complete the assignment update without leaving manager navigation context
Successful mutations refresh assignment detail and relevant assignment center state while error states remain explicit
